title: 修复 PR 归档历史 Summary 兼容门禁

sources.reason: Current Summary validation that unconditionally enforces v2 fields.
PR aggregate checker that currently requires v2 archive evidence.
Existing archive compatibility and PR ownership tests.
Defines historical archive compatibility and append-only governance requirements.

problemStatement: The PR checker validates every changed archive as a new v2 Work Item, so historical-compatible Summary evidence without summaryVersion 2 or worktreeDigest produces hundreds of false blocking errors.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Legacy archive Summary remains readable without summaryVersion 2 or per-result worktreeDigest.
New v2 archive evidence still requires the complete Summary and verification evidence.
The target-base PR aggregate checker reports zero errors for the historical-compatible archive set.

riskAssessment.reason: Compatibility must be limited to immutable historical evidence while preserving strict validation for newly created v2 archive pairs.

executionDecision.reason: The failure is reproducible against the stated target base and the compatibility boundary is explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review that legacy compatibility cannot weaken validation for newly added v2 archive evidence.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Historical archive Summary evidence without v2-only fields remains readable.
New v2 archive evidence remains strict and fail-closed.
PR aggregate ownership validation passes against the target base with zero errors.
The implementation plan for the remaining remediation loop is recorded.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The target-base PR gate treats historical archive evidence as newly created v2 evidence, producing hundreds of false errors and blocking merge.
constraints: Keep historical archive evidence append-only and readable.
Do not weaken validation for newly added v2 archive pairs.
intent.rationale: Compatibility must be encoded at the historical-evidence boundary so the target PR can pass without rewriting old records or accepting incomplete new evidence.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: User explicitly requested the full remediation loop to continue until all listed blockers are completed.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
